/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -march=native -ffast-math CMakeFiles/graphcomputenode.dir/tools/graphcomputenode.cc.o -o graphcomputenode   -L/opt/homebrew/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib libcedar_gcn.a libcedar.a libcedar_graph.a third_party/brpc/output/lib/libbrpc.a -lgRPC::grpc++ -lgflags -lpthread libcedar_gcn.a -lgflags libcedar.a -llz4 -lgRPC::grpc++ /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libcurl.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libprotobuf.so -lyaml-cpp::yaml-cpp third_party/braft/output/lib/libbraft.a /usr/local/lib/libbrpc.a /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libgflags.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libprotobuf.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libleveldb.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so -ldl -lz -lrt
